concept_reference.direction: Recreate concept 1's feature-callout layout exactly -- clean white studio background, a pair of sunglasses shown from a rear/inside 3/4 angle (so the inside of the frame, nose pads, and hinges are visible), two thin pointer lines leading to bold uppercase sans-serif labels on the left ('COMFORTABLE NOSE PADS') and right ('3-BARREL METAL HINGES'), plus a circular inset on the right side showing a zoomed crop of the hinge detail. Adapt everything from concept 1, replace the product with DuberyMNL Outback Blue using concept 2 for color/material/branding fidelity.

visual_mood: Clean, technical, premium product-spec graphic. Bright studio, crisp edges, confident brand documentation feel.

scene.location: Pure clean white studio background, no props, no shadows except a soft realistic contact shadow under the product
scene.atmosphere: Minimalist catalog/spec page aesthetic -- product hero-center, annotations around it, balanced negative space
scene.lighting: Professional product studio lighting -- soft broad key light from camera-front-top, soft fill from camera-left to lift the shadow side, subtle rim highlights defining the top edge of the frame and the hinge metal, clean natural contact shadow beneath the product on the white surface. No harsh hotspots, no color casts.
scene.product_placement: Product laid on a clean surface at a rear/inside 3/4 angle matching concept 1 -- frame opens toward the camera so the inside face of the frame, nose pads, and hinges are visible. Temple arms unfolded and angled outward.

required_details: Square-style matte polycarbonate frame with angular flat-top edge
Vibrant blue mirrored polarized lenses (viewed from the inside/rear angle, lenses read as darker blue-gray polarized tint with subtle blue mirror edge-bleed where light wraps the rim)
DUBERY wordmark in white sans-serif on the outside of the right temple arm (matches concept 2 exactly)
3-barrel metal hinge at each temple-to-frame joint, silver stainless finish, clearly visible from this rear 3/4 angle
Integrated black nose pads on the inner bridge
product.proportions: Standard retro frame with standard hinge-to-hinge width -- do NOT enlarge or inflate the frame
product.render_notes:
POSITION: laid flat on white surface, rear/inside 3/4 angle matching concept 1.
ANGLE: roughly 7-8 o'clock on the inside of the frame, so the viewer sees inside the left half of the frame and the outside of the right temple arm.
LIGHTING: soft broad top-front key catches the matte frame edges cleanly and puts a subtle specular on the metal hinges.
FIDELITY: frame shape, matte black exterior, blue mirror lens identity, white DUBERY temple-arm wordmark, and 3-barrel metal hinges must match the provided reference images exactly.
product.instruction: The sunglasses MUST match the exact frame shape, matte black color, flat-top square geometry, blue mirrored polarized lenses, 3-barrel metal hinges, and white DUBERY wordmark on the outer right temple arm shown in the reference images. Treat the product as a locked asset. Do not alter proportions, do not restyle. Render it photographed into the callout layout.

composition.layout: 1:1 square. Product centered horizontally, sitting slightly below center (around 55% from top), occupying roughly 70% of the frame width. Label 'COMFORTABLE NOSE PADS' placed top-left in bold uppercase sans-serif with a thin dark pointer line leading from the label down to the inner nose-pad area of the frame. Label '3-BARREL METAL HINGES' placed middle-right in bold uppercase sans-serif with a thin dark pointer line leading from the label to the metal hinge at the right temple joint. A circular inset (about 22-25% of frame width, clean thin dark circular border) placed upper-right showing a zoomed macro crop of the 3-barrel metal hinge in the same lighting style.
composition.typography: Bold uppercase sans-serif labels, medium-dark charcoal gray (#222-#333), small size, letter-spacing slightly loose. Pointer lines: thin (1-1.5px equivalent), same charcoal, clean straight with a tiny dot or short angle-break if needed, matching concept 1 exactly.
composition.branding_placement: DuberyMNL brand identity reads through the white 'DUBERY' wordmark naturally present on the outer right temple arm of the product. NO additional Dubery logo overlaid in the frame -- the labels and inset are the only overlays.

prompt: Square 1:1 clean white studio product-callout graphic. A pair of DuberyMNL Outback Blue sunglasses lies on a pure white surface at a rear/inside 3/4 angle (matching the angle and composition of the primary concept reference) -- the inside of the frame, the nose pads on the inner bridge, and the silver 3-barrel metal hinges at the temple joints are clearly visible; the outer right temple arm shows the white DUBERY sans-serif wordmark. The frame is matte black square polycarbonate with an angular flat-top edge, and the polarized blue mirrored lenses read as darker blue-gray tint from this rear angle with a subtle blue mirror edge-bleed where light wraps the rim. Product fidelity MUST match the provided reference images exactly -- frame shape, matte finish, blue mirror lens identity, 3-barrel metal hinges, and white DUBERY temple-arm wordmark are locked. Do not alter proportions or styling. Professional product studio lighting: soft broad key light from camera-front-top, soft left fill, subtle rim highlights on the top edge of the frame and on the metal hinges, clean natural contact shadow beneath the product on the white surface. The product sits centered horizontally at about 55% from the top, occupying roughly 70% of the frame width. Annotation overlay, matching the primary concept reference exactly: top-left label 'COMFORTABLE NOSE PADS' in bold uppercase charcoal sans-serif with a thin charcoal pointer line leading from the label down to the inner nose-pad area of the frame; middle-right label '3-BARREL METAL HINGES' in bold uppercase charcoal sans-serif with a thin charcoal pointer line leading from the label to the metal hinge at the right temple joint; and a circular inset in the upper-right (about 22-25% of frame width, clean thin dark circular border) showing a zoomed macro crop of the 3-barrel metal hinge rendered in the same lighting style. No other text, no other logos overlaid anywhere in the frame. Clean, technical, premium spec-page aesthetic.
negative_prompt: No extra text, no additional logos overlaid, no watermarks, no color background, no harsh shadows, no stylized illustration, no 3D render look, no flat color lenses without realistic polarized character, no inflated or oversized frame proportions, no cursive script labels.
